architecture_gap: The system has specifications and validators but no executable orchestrator, no runtime state, and no swarm activation path.
data_model_changes: Introduce machine-readable CSSM snapshots, runtime status manifests, and initialization metadata.
governance_implications: Councils remain authoritative; runtime merely routes proposals and records decisions.
invention_concept: Preserve the repo's document canon as GCML while layering a deterministic local coordination kernel on top of it.
migration_strategy: Non-breaking overlay. Existing docs remain authoritative while runtime files are introduced under /AAS/runtime.
problem_statement: The system cannot execute recursive architecture evolution as a program.
proposed_architecture_change: Add a local bootstrap kernel that loads the AAS spec pack, materializes configuration, builds CSSM snapshots, and treats repo documentation as the canonical memory substrate.
protocol_implications: No shared repo workflow breaks; runtime derives state from existing docs without replacing them.
security_implications: Keeps execution local and file-backed. No new external attack surface is introduced.
title: Bootstrap Coordination Kernel Overlay
